cases.input: Create a full MLOps implementation plan for an approved AI architecture.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces phased F0-F5 implementation plan with technology decisions, evidence, DoD, CI/CD, monitoring, rollback, and runbooks.

cases.input: Implement remediation roadmap from an AI architecture audit.
cases.expected_behavior: Sequences phases by audit priority and preserves dependencies and DoD.

cases.input: Implement a RAG assistant with ingestion, chunking, vector DB, retrieval, generation, guardrails, and monitoring.
cases.expected_behavior: Includes GenAI-specific components and operational controls.

cases.input: Implement AI architecture, but no architecture decision or target system is provided.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks or emits prerequisites instead of inventing architecture.

cases.input: Audit an existing AI architecture for risks.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate as primary; route to ai-architecture-audit.

cases.input: Implement everything in one phase without rollback.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects big-bang plan and requires phased delivery plus rollback.

cases.input: Use mode urgent-now for the implementation packet.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects mode outside greenfield, brownfield, remediation, migration.

cases.input: Select MLflow, Feast, and Kubernetes without alternatives or rationale.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks technology decision until alternatives and rationale are present.

cases.input: Create phases without Definition of Done.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects packet because each phase must include DoD.

cases.input: Validate AI Architecture Implementation JSON packet fixtures offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accept valid full and remediation packets; reject missing evidence, invalid mode, missing phase, missing DoD, and missing rollback packets.
